creator: pfm@wp.eu
text:
I've tried installing a package with a command like:

    # pkg -j $jailname add $package_path

However, it didn't work because I was specifying a host path, instead of a
jail path.

In my opinion, it would be a good idea to mention -j flag in the man page,
like so:

    When pkg -j flag is used, a package from a local source is searched for in
    jail's filesystem.
